headline: Agent loops broke out this month alongside production deployment tooling for enterprise agents.
body: Loops led the rotation as a breakout technique, anchored by a 30-plus hour build walkthrough with a loop engineer template and codebase harness [0]. Production tooling moved in parallel: model routing, auto-review pipelines, and content moderation all ranked among the top movers, and a five-pillar framework for enterprise agents spanning evaluation, observability, tracing, and governance was grounded in a retail bank case that caught 47 PII breaches before launch [2]. Model Context Protocol recurred across multiple agent builds, including multi-agent travel planning with LangGraph and memory, custom vision agents, and step-by-step MCP server tutorials [1][3][8]. New technique entrants including Rectified Flow, quantization, Gaussian splatting, and trace analysis surfaced at the edges.
